rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA A. GRIJALVA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent'S Motion To Compel Petitioner Alfredo Grijalva To Appear For Desposition And Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2006. Respondents Nelson and Bianca Grijalva's motion to compel petitioner Alredo Grijalva to appear for deposition and produce documents is Granted. Petitioner is ordered to appear for deposition on October 18 and 19, 2006. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA A. GRIJALVA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motions And Motions For Order To Compel Respondent Nelson E. Grijalva To Answer Questions At Desposition And Produce For Inspection Documents And/ Or Tangible Things Described In Deposition Notice, For Protective Order Setting The Order Of Despositions, And For Order Of Despositions And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Respondent And His Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2006. Petitioner Alfredo Grijalva's motion to compel responses at deposition is Granted. Respondent is ordered to appear on October 20, 2006 and answer the specified questions in the separate statement of matters in dispute and reasonable follow-up questions. If all responsive documents have been produced, respondent is ordered to verify that representation. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. = (610/BEC)
